items.title: Actively exploited Apache ActiveMQ flaw impacts 6,400 servers
items.summary: Nonprofit security organization Shadowserver found that over 6,400 Apache ActiveMQ servers exposed online are vulnerable to ongoing attacks exploiting a high-severity code injection vulnerability. [...]
